# Dyam Marcano

> Senior Backend Engineer based in São Paulo, Brazil. 10+ years building high-scale, fault-tolerant distributed systems for financial institutions — from banks to the Brazilian stock market (B3) — with products handling 10M+ operations and platforms processing 20M+ transactions per day. Cross-functional engineer at Itaú Unibanco. Deep expertise in Go, Java, application security, PCI-DSS and Bacen/PIX regulatory compliance, legacy-to-Go modernization, and Go + AI/LLM tooling.

## Profile

- **Name:** Dyam Marcano
- **Role:** Senior Backend Engineer
- **Location:** São Paulo, Brazil
- **Experience:** 10+ years; fintech — banks and the stock market (Itaú Unibanco, B3, Banco Caroni)
- **Scale:** stock-market products at 10M+ operations/day; platforms processing 20M+ transactions/day
- **Notable work:** cross-functional engineer at Itaú Unibanco; modernizing legacy services by porting them to Go on Kubernetes
- **Languages spoken:** Portuguese (native), Spanish (native), English (professional)

## Core skills

- **Languages:** Go (6+ yrs), Java/Spring Boot (8+ yrs), TypeScript, Python, SQL; learning Rust
- **Security:** PCI-DSS, Bacen (Brazilian Central Bank) & PIX, cryptography (RSA/AES), HSM/KMS, TLS/mTLS, OAuth2/JWT/OIDC, RBAC, EMV card migrations
- **Cloud & infra:** AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Kafka/NATS/Pulsar, gRPC, PostgreSQL/Redis/MongoDB
- **Architecture:** microservices, event-driven (CQRS/SAGA/Event Sourcing), Hexagonal, Domain-Driven Design
- **AI / LLMs:** Claude/MCP, llama.cpp, agents, LLM tooling
- **Values:** Clean Code — "clear is better than clever"

## Open source — inovacc (InovaCloud Consultoria)

Maintainer of the open-source [inovacc](https://github.com/inovacc) Go ecosystem. Most-worked repositories:

- **unravel** — security-research CLI/MCP server that dissects desktop & mobile apps to extract knowledge bases
- **scout** — Go-idiomatic headless browser automation, web scraping and search
- **sequa** — Postgres migrations, SQL client/REPL, and type-safe Go codegen
- **corral** — provider-abstracted runtime for driving coding-agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex) behind one interface
- **selo** — Brazilian document validation (CPF, CNPJ) for Go
- **gitc** — non-bypassable, forensically-audited git guardrail for AI coding agents
